# AirdropGuard

AirdropGuard is an AI-assisted platform for discovering verified crypto airdrops, checking wallet safety signals, and learning safer airdrop workflows.

## Important Pages
- [Home](/)
- [API Documentation](/api-docs)
- [Learn](/learn)
- [Scam Alerts](/scam-alerts)
- [Wallet Checker](/wallet-checker)
- [Submit Airdrop](/submit)
- [Pricing](/pricing)
- [Articles](/articles)
- [Risk Disclosure](/risk-disclosure)
- [Terms](/terms)
